acceptance_criteria:
1. minijinja added as derive crate dependency
2. Jinja syntax validation at compile time
3. Static field reference validation (value.foo checks)
4. Filter name validation against known set
5. allow_dynamic opt-in skips field validation
6. Clear error messages with suggestions
7. Test: invalid syntax causes compile error
8. Test: unknown field causes compile error
9. cargo check passes
title: Add compile-time Jinja template validation in derive macro

title: Phase 10 reverification

description: [DSRs: crates/rlm-core/src/variable.rs] Create RlmVariable struct (name, type_desc, description, constraints, total_length, preview, properties). Implement from_rust<T: RlmDescribe>(), with_description(), with_constraints(), format() producing DSPy-style variable preview blocks.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 2.2): add variable description helper in `crates/rlm-core/src/variable.rs`.
- `RlmVariable { name, type_desc, description, constraints, total_length, preview, properties }`.
- `RlmVariable::from_rust<T: RlmDescribe>` computes type/preview and property list.
- `format()` renders prompt-ready block including constraints + preview.
Update `rlm-core/src/lib.rs` to export `RlmVariable`.

title: Task 2.2: Create variable description for prompts
